action.description: The attempted action that was blocked (e.g. optimization_run, benchmark_generation, agent_create). Lets the client tell apart which create/run/ingest hit the cap.

reserved_usage.description: Units currently reserved (held by in-flight operations) for this resource in the active period, separate from settled current_usage.

enforcement_behavior.description: How the cap is enforced for this action. block = the action is rejected; drop = the request is accepted but over-quota units are not persisted; sample = a reduced fraction is persisted. Wallet/cost ceilings are reported separately via the wallet error contract, never here.
